titleStmt.title: SII 9.583: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 583. (A.R. No. 68 of 1912.) ON THE SOUTHERN WALL OF THE PRAKARA OF THE LAKSHMIDEVI TEMPLE AT GORREPALLI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Chaitra, śu. 5, Maṅgaḷavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1538 March 5, Tuesday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Vīraṇa-Nāyaka, brother of Penugoṇḍe Virapaṇṇayya, son of Nandi-Lakkiseṭṭi, constructed a canal called Nūtana-Tuṅgabhadrā from a spring to the north of the village Modaya, surnamed Achyutarāyapura, which had been granted by the king for the service of the gods Vīrēśvara, Pāpavināśadēva and Rāghavēśvara, and made a gift of the land under the new canal for the service of the goddess Mahālakshmīdēvi at Haruhe-Lakkhaṇāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīśakavaruṣēbhrarutvabdhiśaśabhain™ mitē viḷaṁbināmakē caitrē . śuddhaśrīpaṁca�votithau . penugoṁ
ḍamahārājyē rodagrāmaśya sīmani . lēpākṣivīrabhedrādidēvatōtsavasiddhayē . Acyutēṁdrama
hārāyēṇārpitasya svanāmataḥ . grāmasya modayākhyasya sthalē yatnēna nirmitā . . śrīmanṛ
muddāṁbikānaṁdilakkiśeṭṭitanūbhavā . virapaṁṇānujēna śrīvīrabhūpālamauḷinā . śrīlakhkhaṇā
purī(ṁ)lakṣmyāḥ naivēdyādisamaiddhayē . tuṁgabhadrā(ṁ)hvayā kulyā tuṁgabhadraphalapradā . sahira(ṁ)ṇyapayōdā
nadhārāpūrvaṁ samarpitā Ācaṁdrārkaṁ bhaktajanapāraṁparyēṇa vardhatāṁ . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaru
ṣaṁgaḷu 1460 neya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada caitra śu 5 maṁgaḷavāradalū śrīmānṛmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīacyutadēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgaivuttiralū . lēpākṣi naṁdilakkiśeṭṭi muddamāṁbā varaku
māra penugoṁḍe virapaṁṇayyanavara taṁmaṁdiru vīraṇanāyakarū haruhe lakhkhaṇāpurada mahālakṣmīdēvi
A(ṁ)mmanavarige dhūpa dīpa Amrutapaḍi naivēdya nrutya gīta vādya muṁtāda vaibhavaṁgaḷa nimityavāgi lēpākṣi vīrēśvaradē
varu pāpavināśadēvaru rāghavēśvaradēvarugaḷige Acyutadēvamahārāyaru samarpisi dhāreneradu koṭṭa śāsanasthavāda
modeyakke pratināmavāda Acyutarāyapuraveṁba grāmada vuttarabhāgadalli talaparigeyanu tegesi nūtana tuṁgabhadre
yaṁba hesaruḷḷa kāluveyanū taṁdu I kāluveya nīru haridu beḷevaṣṭu gaddege guyyalūra sīmevoḷa
gaṇa Aṁttayyana koḍagihaḷḷige saluva nāgoṁḍḍana holanū Adakke saluva jālīmarada tōṁpunū ciṁnapanā
yakara makkaḷu kruṣṇappanāyakkara keIlū I lakṣmidēviAmmanavarige prāku dhārenerasi koḍasida I holaṁnū I vī
raṇanāyakkarū tā(ṁ)vu taṁdaṁthā I tuṁgabhadreyaṁba kāluveyanū I lakṣmīdēvia(ṁ)mmanavarige sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadāna
dhārāpūrvakavāgi ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāyiĀgi dhāreneradu koṭṭa dharmaśāsana yī dharmakke Ārobbaru tappidarū �yo dē
vatādrōhigaḷu mātāpitṛdrōhigaḷū . sāmā(ṁ)nyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ .
sarvānētānṛ(ṁ) bhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrān™ bhuyyō bhuyyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 9.583 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
